title: Senior Java Developer
description: FinCore is a B2B payments infrastructure company processing £2B+ annually. We're seeking a Senior Java Developer to join our Core Payments team. You will design and build the transaction processing engine that thousands of businesses rely on. We value engineers who care deeply about correctness, performance, and operational excellence.
responsibilities: Design and implement high-throughput payment processing services (10k TPS)
Ensure ACID compliance and idempotency across distributed transaction flows
Lead technical design reviews and mentor 2 junior developers
Collaborate with risk and compliance on regulatory requirements
